title: basilikos #0937
definition:
1) of or belong to a king, kingly, royal, regal
    1a) of a man, the officer or minister of a prince, a courtier
 2) subject to a king
    2a) of a country
 3) befitting or worthy of a king, royal
 4) metaph. principal, chief
